falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average for 14 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained strength above a key long-term trendline would contradict the blowoff pattern's expectation of a sharp reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume declines below 50% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top typically requires escalating volume during the climax phase; sustained low volume would invalidate the pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day RSI remains above 70 for 14 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent overbought conditions without a corrective pullback would disprove the blowoff scenario's expected price collapse

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
